enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a day in his life in Boulder, covering a late-night swim at his clubhouse, errands to the hardware store for a bathroom light fixture, fixing a watts converter chart for his fluid trainer rollers, feeding crickets to a pet gecko, and showing off a handmade warrior costume with helmet, daggers, shin guards, and a small shield. He also visits a triathlon store called Guckins to pick up swimming gear including fins, a snorkel, and swim paddles.
enrichment.speaker: kyle
